name: CLX - MGA Insurance Suitability Conversation Handler v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Triggered by inbound message handler when a lead with an in-progress suitability assessment replies. Looks up suitability_assessments WHERE vertical_id='insurance' AND status='in_progress' AND lead_id=:lead_id, calls Claude with conversation history, decides ask-next | clarify | complete, persists answer + next state, sends next question OR triggers needs-analysis (A2.2).

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Validate').item.json;
const rows = $input.item.json;
const assessment = (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows[0] : rows) || null;
if (!assessment || !assessment.id) return { json: { _no_assessment: true, lead_id: ctx.lead_id, message: ctx.message } };
const situation = assessment.client_situation || {};
const history = Array.isArray(situation.qa_history) ? situation.qa_history : [];

const systemPrompt = [
  'You are continuing a conversational suitability interview for the INSURANCE vertical (vertical_id=insurance).',
  'Product under consideration: ' + assessment.product_type,
  'Channel: ' + (assessment.channel || ctx.channel),
  '',
  'You receive: the latest client answer + the running Q&A history.',
  'Decide: continue (ask one more question), clarify (re-ask the last question more clearly), or complete (you have enough to derive needs_analysis).',
  '',
  'For ' + assessment.product_type + ', you must capture (at minimum):',
  '  - dependents / household composition',
  '  - approximate household income (range OK)',
  '  - existing coverage (if any) including carrier + amount',
  '  - debts / mortgage status',
  '  - health considerations relevant to product',
  '  - risk tolerance signal (low / moderate / high)',
  'Prefer COMPLETE as soon as the minimum is captured. Do not over-interview.',
  '',
  'Output strictly JSON. Schema:',
  '{',
  '  "action":                  "ask_next" | "clarify" | "complete",',
  '  "next_question":           "<text>"        // present unless action=complete',
  '  "client_situation_update": { ... }          // jsonb merge into client_situation',
  '  "reasoning":               "<1 sentence>"',
  '  "risk_tolerance":          "low" | "moderate" | "high" | null    // best guess if observable',
  '}',
  '',
  'Rules:',
  '- Single question. ONE thing at a time.',
  '- For SMS/WhatsApp: keep next_question under 320 characters.',
  '- Be empathetic and plain-spoken; no jargon.'
].join('\n');

const userPayload = JSON.stringify({
  history: history.slice(-12),
  latest_client_answer: ctx.message,
  current_situation_keys: Object.keys(situation).filter(function (k) { return k !== 'qa_history' && k !== 'expected_next'; })
});

return { json: {
  _ready: true,
  assessment: assessment,
  channel: assessment.channel || ctx.channel,
  message: ctx.message,
  claude_payload: {
    model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929',
    max_tokens: 600,
    temperature: 0.3,
    system: systemPrompt,
    messages: [ { role: 'user', content: userPayload } ]
  }
} };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, lead_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.lead_id, client_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.client_id, content: $('Parse Decision').item.json.send_question }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, lead_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.lead_id, client_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.client_id, content: $('Parse Decision').item.json.send_question }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: $('Parse Decision').item.json.trigger_needs_analysis ? 'suitability_completed' : 'suitability_question_asked', client_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.client_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { suitability_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.assessment_id, lead_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.lead_id, channel: $('Parse Decision').item.json.channel }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: $json.error || 'no in-progress assessment for lead' }) }}
